visualization.title: Professors Who Have Never Taught a Course Section

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT COUNT(p.id) AS professors_never_taught
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
WHERE cs.id IS NULL

visualization.title: Professors Who Have Never Taught a Course Section

result.sql:
SELECT COUNT(p.id) AS professors_never_taught

WHERE cs.id IS NULL
